heading: ALLOTMENT FOR STUDENT WITH DYSLEXIA OR RELATED DISORDER
operative_text: Subject to Subsection (b), for each student that a school district serves who has been identified as having dyslexia or a related disorder, the district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the basic allotment multiplied by 0.1 or a greater amount provided by appropriation.
_note: Statute contains dual versions of subsecs. (b), (c), and (d)—one effective until Sept. 1, 2026, and one effective on Sept. 1, 2026 (per H.B. 2 and S.B. 568, 89th Leg.). Key change in (b): post-2026 version removes requirement for SBE-program-criteria-compliant instruction and trained personnel, replacing with broader 'instruction, services, or accommodations' language. Key change in (d): post-2026 version removes the 20% cap on private-provider contracting. No terms are explicitly defined within this section.
